allow: Bash(python -c "import yaml,sys; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('.woodpecker.yaml'\)\); print\('OK steps:', list\(d['steps'].keys\(\)\), '| commands:', len\(d['steps']['sync-to-prod']['commands']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('.woodpecker.yaml'\)\); print\('YAML OK, command entries:', len\(d['steps']['sync-to-prod']['commands']\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('.woodpecker.yaml'\)\); print\('YAML OK'\); print\('clone env:', d['clone']['git']['environment']\); print\('first cmd:', d['steps']['sync-to-prod']['commands'][0]\)")
Bash(python -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('.woodpecker.yaml'\)\); print\('YAML OK'\); print\('clone env:', d['clone']['git']['environment']\)")
Bash(python -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('.woodpecker.yaml'\)\); print\('YAML OK. when:', d['when']\); print\('env keys:', list\(d['steps']['sync-to-prod']['environment'].keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('.woodpecker.yaml'\)\); print\('YAML OK'\); print\('top keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('skip_clone:', d.get\('skip_clone'\)\); print\('when:', d['when']\)")
